1,200 athletes are set to compete in the inaugural edition of Apex Games on 6 June at Dubai World Trade Centre. Ahead of the highly anticipated event, CAB Sports and DXB LIVE have announced a new partnership with Technogym, which joins as the Official Technical and Performance Partner.
